name: linSetRespDisturbance
title: linSetRespDisturbance
syntax: long linSetRespDisturbance (long frameId, long lengthInBits, long level, long offsetInSixteenthBits);
description: Activates a disturbance in the response space of the specified LIN frame. A normal response by a simulated slave will be deactivated as long as the disturbance is active.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: LIN frame identifier in the range 0 .. 63.

parameters.name: lengthInBits
parameters.description: The duration of the disturbance [in bit times].

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The level of the disturbance. 0: dominant disturbance (inverts recessive bits) 1: recessive disturbance (inverts dominant bits - requires mag-Cab/Piggyback and external power supply)

parameters.name: offsetInSixteenthBits
parameters.description: The offset [in 1/16th bits] of the disturbance relative to the end of the header, i.e. to the PID byte.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

description: On pressing 'c' key start corrupting the response space and the first databyte of the response for LIN frame Motor1State_Cycl.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
